title: One Way Elytra
description:
Datapack Functionality:
The datapack gives you a special, one-time-use Elytra or an alternative "Glider" function when you’re within the defined OWE spawn radius.
body:
Hey <3

Datapack Functionality:
The datapack gives you a special, one-time-use Elytra or an alternative "Glider" function when you’re within the defined OWE spawn radius.

How it works:
1. Automatic Elytra Assignment: If you’re within the OWE spawn radius, you’ll automatically receive an Elytra.
2. Alternative "Glider" Function: If your chest slot (where the Elytra would go) is already occupied, your item will instead receive a "Glider" function, allowing you to glide as if you had an Elytra.
3. One-Time Use: The Elytra or the Glider function disappears once your flight ends, ensuring it cannot be used multiple times.

Commands:
- /trigger Spawn: Sets the OWE spawn point.
- /trigger spawn_radius set NUMBER: Sets the radius within which the Elytra or Glider function activates. The default value for the radius is 20.



Bug Fixes:
If any issues arise, you can use the following commands:
- /reload : Reloads the datapack.
- /function oneway_elytra:load : Runs a specific function to reload the datapack.

These functions help refresh or fix the OWE Elytra functionality as needed.

perfect for your Server?
